title: T-058 — Migrate integration tests to getAppConnection() (T-045 AC4 truthing)
prompt:
# T-058 — Migrate integration tests to getAppConnection()

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §5 (RLS default), §13 (Tests run as app-role)
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Audit source: `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-wave-a-consistency-audit.md` §C; carry-forward CF-22
Severity: P0 (Wave-B blocker — T-045 AC4 unmet until this lands)

## Goal
Migrate the ~8 pre-existing integration tests in `packages/db/__tests__/` from raw `new pg.Pool({connectionString: DATABASE_URL})` (which connects as superuser and bypasses RLS) to the layered `getAppConnection()` (app-role) for assertion connections, with `getOwnerConnection()` only used for setup/teardown DDL. Also delete the legacy `packages/db/lib/client.ts` superuser export OR re-point it at `app_user` credentials so any package importing `@monopilot/db` does not silently bypass RLS.

## Implementation contract
For each of these test files, replace `new pg.Pool({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL })` with `getAppConnection()` for assertion blocks and `getOwnerConnection()` only for `beforeAll`/`afterAll` DDL/seed inserts that legitimately need owner privileges:
- packages/db/__tests__/baseline.integration.test.ts
- packages/db/__tests__/rls.cross-org.integration.test.ts
- packages/db/__tests__/audit.integration.test.ts
- packages/db/__tests__/tenant-idp-config.integration.test.ts
- packages/db/__tests__/departments.integration.test.ts
- packages/db/__tests__/r13-business-tables.test.ts
- packages/db/__tests__/outbox.integration.test.ts (if exists)
- packages/db/src/__tests__/tenant-migrations.test.ts

Add an env-guard to `getAppConnection()` so the hardcoded `'app_user_test_password'` fallback throws unless `NODE_ENV=test` or `CI=true`.

Decide and implement one of these for the legacy `db` export:
- (preferred) Delete `packages/db/lib/client.ts` and re-point `packages/db/package.json:main` to `./src/index.ts` (which only re-exports `getAppConnection`).
- (alternative) Modify `packages/db/lib/client.ts` so `db` is constructed via `getAppConnection()` rather than reading `DATABASE_URL` directly.

Add an ESLint rule to T-055's shared base (or directly in this task if T-055 lands later) that blocks `new pg.Pool(...)` outside `packages/db/src/clients.ts` and `packages/db/scripts/migrate.ts`. If T-055 has already landed, just verify the rule fires; if not, add it inline here.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/__tests__/baseline.integration.test.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/rls.cross-org.integration.test.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/audit.integration.test.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/tenant-idp-config.integration.test.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/departments.integration.test.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/r13-business-tables.test.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/outbox.integration.test.ts [modify if exists]
- packages/db/src/__tests__/tenant-migrations.test.ts [modify]
- packages/db/src/clients.ts [modify — add env-guard for hardcoded password fallback]
- packages/db/lib/client.ts [delete or modify]
- packages/db/package.json [modify if main re-pointed]
- packages/db/eslint.config.mjs [modify — verify or add new-Pool restriction; depends on T-055]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migrated tests, when grep new pg.Pool runs over test files, then zero matches outside clients.ts and migrate.ts; AND Given ESLint rule, when deliberate new pg.Pool added in test, then pnpm lint fails.
2. Given getAppConnection() in tests, when SELECT current_user runs, then it returns app_user.
3. Given env-guard, when fallback used in NODE_ENV=production, then getAppConnection throws.
4. Given legacy db export decision, when external packages import @monopilot/db, then db queries never run as superuser; AND Given the migration, when pnpm test runs, then all tests pass with zero regressions.
## Test strategy
- RED: for each migrated file, before changing the connection, add a `expect(currentUser).toBe('app_user')` assertion immediately after the pool initialization to confirm the test would have failed under the old superuser pattern.
- Run `grep -rn 'new pg.Pool' packages/db/` after GREEN; assert zero matches outside `clients.ts` and `scripts/migrate.ts`.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/db test`; assert all tests pass.
- Run `pnpm lint` after T-055 lands (or after this task adds the rule); confirm the new-Pool restriction fires on a deliberate violation.

## Risk red lines
- Do NOT use `getOwnerConnection()` for assertion blocks — only setup/teardown DDL.
- Do NOT remove the existing RLS assertions; they must still pass under app_user.
- Do NOT skip the env-guard on the password fallback.
- Do NOT silently keep the superuser `db` export from `lib/client.ts`.
- Do NOT modify `packages/db/src/clients.ts` semantics beyond the env-guard addition.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED `expect(currentUser).toBe('app_user')` per file) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.parent_feature: Wave A consolidation — tests as app_user
pipeline_inputs.description: Migrate ~8 pre-existing integration tests from raw new pg.Pool (superuser) to getAppConnection (app_user) for assertions; add env-guard on hardcoded password fallback; delete or refit legacy db export from lib/client.ts.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Replace new pg.Pool with getAppConnection() in 8 test files; getOwnerConnection only for DDL setup; add env-guard to getAppConnection password fallback (throw unless NODE_ENV=test or CI=true); delete packages/db/lib/client.ts or refit to use app_user; verify ESLint rule from T-055 fires on raw new Pool.

AC count consolidated from 6→4 by Fixer F7 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost).
out_of_scope: Do not change getAppConnection semantics beyond env-guard.
Do not consolidate schema directories (T-053 owns).

Given getAppConnection() in tests, when SELECT current_user runs, then it returns app_user.
Given env-guard, when fallback used in NODE_ENV=production, then getAppConnection throws.

Given legacy db export decision, when external packages import @monopilot/db, then db queries never run as superuser; AND Given the migration, when pnpm test runs, then all tests pass with zero regressions.

Grep new pg.Pool after GREEN; assert zero matches outside clients.ts and migrate.ts.
Run pnpm lint with deliberate violation; confirm rule fires.

Do not remove existing RLS assertions.
Do not skip env-guard on password fallback.
Do not keep superuser db export silently.
